session: DB-guided extraction built and deployed. 141 migration JSONs now have full extraction+synthesis blocks populated via single-call Claude API guided by pre-computed DB intelligence. 146 DOCXs generated with all 12 sections populated.
status: DB_GUIDED_EXTRACTION_COMPLETE. 146/146 codon files fully extracted and DOCX-generated. Pipeline v4 operational with codon-first architecture.
mission: Transform a static reference library into a queryable, exam-aware knowledge base. Every clinical guideline is understood not just for what it says, but for how the ABFM has tested it.

architecture_v4.name: DB-Guided Extraction (codon-first)
architecture_v4.principle: Pre-computed DB intelligence acts as extraction guide. One focused Claude call per file instead of three blind ones.
architecture_v4.flow: Parse codon -> DB clue assembly (concept_tags, question stems, explanations, thresholds) -> raw pdfplumber text + clue package -> ONE Claude call -> structured extraction + synthesis -> merge into JSON -> DOCX generation
architecture_v4.cost: ~$0.03-0.05/file via Batch API (50% discount) vs ~$0.15-0.30/file old pipeline
architecture_v4.key_insight: DB data tells Claude WHAT to look for, raw text tells Claude WHERE to find it. Claude only makes the final connections.

current_library.enriched_jsons: 222 total (146 with full extraction + ITE intelligence, 76 with navigator_v1 scaffold only)

FLAG_1_ite_enrichment_quality_dimension.description: The self-improving QC loop (calibrate.py) scores 5 extraction dimensions but has NO scoring for the ite_intelligence{} block.
FLAG_1_ite_enrichment_quality_dimension.action: Add 6th dimension to guideline_extractor_v2/oneclick/calibrate.py. Suggested weight: 10-15%, renormalize existing weights.
FLAG_1_ite_enrichment_quality_dimension.trigger: After pipeline is wired and right-click extractions are producing enriched JSONs

FLAG_13_intelligence_2_0.status: OPEN — layers designed, not yet built
FLAG_13_intelligence_2_0.description: Four intelligence layers: ICD-10 tagging, PubMed currency, clinical pathways, predictive trends

codon_design.rationale: Short stable article ID keeps filenames under 100 chars. Full QID list lives in DB. Pipeline does match-and-grab not compute-and-drop.
